profile: The candidate is an experienced Senior Quantity Surveyor with 2+ years of relevant experience. Experience spans data centre, pharma, and commercial environments. Recent project exposure includes Pre-construction & cost planning (MEP & CSA), Procurement & tendering, Package strategy, Bid analysis, Negotiation. Qualifications include BSc (Hons) Quantity Surveying & Construction Economics.
